name: Prestige Pawn LLC
description_short: Prestige Pawn LLC operates two pawn shops in northern West Virginia offering collateral-based loans, gold and jewelry buying, firearms sales, and used merchandise.
description_long:
Prestige Pawn LLC has operated in northern West Virginia since the early 1980s, initially starting as a coin and gold jewelry store in the Weirton Shopping Plaza. The business evolved into a full-service pawn shop in 1991 when firearms and electronics were added to their inventory. A second location was established in Chester, West Virginia in 1995, and the original Weirton store relocated to a larger facility on Potomac Avenue in 2013, significantly expanding their showroom and storage capacity. The company positions itself as one of the oldest pawn and gold buying shops in the region.

Prestige Pawn offers traditional pawn shop services including collateral-based lending where customers can borrow money against personal property, gold and jewelry buying services, firearms sales, and the purchase and resale of electronics and other used items. According to their website, they maintain thousands of new and used items in inventory across their two locations. The business accepts multiple payment methods for purchases made in their stores.

The company distinguishes itself through longevity and established community presence, having operated for over 30 years with dual locations in Weirton and Chester. They emphasize "honest and courteous service" as a core business principle and have maintained consistent operations through multiple iterations and expansions. The extensive 2013 renovation of their flagship Weirton location demonstrates commitment to improving customer experience and inventory capacity.

Like all pawn shops, Prestige Pawn's primary limitation is that loan amounts are determined by collateral value, making this unsuitable for those without valuable personal property to pledge. Interest rates and loan terms are not disclosed on their website, preventing transparent rate comparison. As a regional operator with only two locations, their service area is geographically limited to northern West Virginia.
address: 156 B W Carolina Ave, Chester, WV 26034

company_info.headquarters: 156 B W Carolina Ave, Chester, WV 26034

pros: Established business with 30+ years operating history since 1991
Two convenient locations in Weirton and Chester, West Virginia
Specializes in gold, jewelry, and firearms with dedicated inventory sections
Expanded showroom and storage after 2013 relocation to better serve customers
Accepts multiple payment methods for purchases
Maintains thousands of new and used items in inventory
Long-standing reputation as one of the oldest pawn shops in northern West Virginia
cons: Loan amounts limited to collateral value; requires customers to own valuable property
No interest rates, APR, or loan terms disclosed on website
Limited geographic service area restricted to two West Virginia locations
No online loan application or remote services mentioned
No information provided about loan approval timeline or eligibility requirements
best_for: West Virginia residents in Weirton or Chester needing quick cash against personal property
Firearms and ammunition buyers in northern West Virginia
Individuals seeking to sell gold jewelry or coins for immediate cash
diagnosis: Best for West Virginia residents in the Weirton or Chester areas who need quick cash and own valuable collateral such as jewelry, firearms, or electronics. Main caveat: loan amounts are strictly limited by collateral value, and the website does not disclose interest rates, terms, or APR, making it difficult to compare costs against other lending options.
services: In-store purchases with multiple payment method options
